# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

repository_s3:
  type: s3
  settings:
    bucket: your_bucket_name
    region: your_region
    access_key: your_access_key
    secret_key: your_secret_key
    base_path: your_base_path

repository_fs:
  type: fs
  settings:
    location: /mount/backups

snapshot_create:
  schedule: "0 30 1 * * ?"
  repository: repository_s3
  name: "<daily-snapshot-{now/d}>"

snapshot_restore:
  repository: repository_fs
  snapshot: latest_snapshot_to_restore
